page.title: Template:Religious buildings and structures completed in year category header

revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{Portal<!-- -->|Architecture<!-- -->|Religion<!-- -->|{{FindYDCportal | {{Title year}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{Category explanation|religious buildings and structures completed in the year '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category if exists|Buildings and structures completed in {{Title year}}|Religious}} [[Category:Religious buildings and structures by year|{{Title year}}]] {{Category if exists|Category:{{Title year}} in religion|Buildings}} [[Category:Religious buildings and structures completed in the {{DECADE|{{Title year}}}}|{{Title year}}s]]<!-- --></includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<!-- --><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Replaced content with "There is no need for this category to exist just creates waste here"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
